reviews.comment:
La atención de las chicas del full es pésima. Los baños estaban sucios, eran baños quimicos. no tenían agua caliente para el mate, 2 maquinas rotas. Un desastre porque si te hablan amablemente uno entiende y sabe disculpar, pero encima de malagana y mal hablados. La próxima hago unos kilómetros más, ahí no paro más.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the girls at the full service bar is terrible. The bathrooms were dirty, like chemical toilets. They didn't have hot water for mate, and two machines were broken. It's a disaster because if they speak to you nicely, you understand and know how to apologize, but on top of that, they're rude and sweary. Next time I'll do a few more kilometers; I won't stop there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuaThEZW53RRAB
